title: astragalus royleanus
intro: Astragalus royleanus, also known as the Astragalus plant, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus royleanus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus royleanus is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
